title: Applications of Derivatives
description: Learn how to use derivatives to find stationary points, determine intervals of increase and decrease, and solve optimization problems.

contentBlocks.text: A stationary point occurs where the derivative of a function is zero: $f'(x) = 0$. These points can be local maxima, local minima, or points of inflection.
Optimization involves finding the maximum or minimum value of a function within a given domain, which is a key application in physics and economics.
